== Notes for [[Item:Q107334|Q107334]] ==

'''Actual Founder of the Abbasid Caliphate'''

* '''2nd Abbasid Caliph'''
* Reign: 136-158 AH (754-775 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Mansur

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/As-Saffah

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zubaidah_bint_Ja%60far

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abbasid


----

* '''From Yemen'''

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Khayzuran

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000007624466659

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
